prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: **狄仁杰主角形象描述提示词：**

A distinguished middle-aged Chinese male detective Di Renjie in traditional Chinese ink painting style, extremely handsome with delicate refined features and clear skin, exuding noble scholarly temperament. Dignified威严面容 with penetrating深邃双眼 that sparkle with intelligence, perfectly groomed black长须 flowing gracefully from his chin. Wearing elaborate官服朝冠 - dark silk official robes with intricate embroidered patterns and traditional court hat adorned with ornamental elements. His挺拔身姿 stands tall and commanding, radiating睿智神态 and沉稳气质 of a master investigator.

Holding a delicate折扇 in one hand with elegant poise, a ceremonial佩剑 hanging at his waist, embodying both scholarly书卷气息 and martial authority. His facial features are exceptionally refined - high cheekbones, straight nose, expressive eyebrows, and intelligent eyes that seem to see through all mysteries. Skin is smooth and clear, befitting his极高颜值 status. Hair styled in traditional Tang dynasty fashion with topknot secured by ornamental hairpin.

Full-body character design, centered standing pose against pure white background, rendered in traditional Chinese水墨画风格 with black, white and gray tones, creating profound artistic conception and depth. The ink wash technique emphasizes the flowing robes and dignified bearing of this legendary detective from Wu Zhou period.

No text, no symbols, no words, no calligraphy marks., very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: ink_painting
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
